rules.rationale_pass: Business justification provided — required condition satisfied
rules.rationale_fail: Business justification missing — hard block; required for all exception offers

rules.description: Salary-to-band ratio must not exceed 2.0x band maximum
rules.rationale_pass: Salary within 2.0x band maximum — policy threshold satisfied
rules.rationale_fail: Salary exceeds 2.0x band maximum — hard block; requires separate CHRO exception process

rules.description: Competing offer documented for salary exceptions above 1.2x band
rules.rationale_pass: Competing offer documentation present — satisfies evidence requirement
rules.rationale_fail: No competing offer documented — required for salary exceptions above 1.2x band; escalation flagged

rules.rationale_pass: Role level specified — comp band lookup possible
rules.rationale_fail: Role level not specified — comp band verification incomplete; WARN flagged
